name: Mirad
description:
☿ ꜒ Slight trouble... ˩ ☿

Source: The Desolate Hope

You are a primary technician in the Lun Infinus Space Station. Because of this, it is your job to assist with whatever problems the Derelicts are having—no matter how important these problems actually are...

Canon Compliance: Nooo!! The Lun Infinus is unmanned in canon, therefore, this is an AU!

Author's note: I figured out this fancier new description. Pretty cool, right? I think it's pretty cool, at least... Anyway, Mirad is so pretty. I love her. You should too.
